about.title: About Us
about.text: Premium Perfumes is the online showcase of the Omaya store — your destination for authentic Arabian and designer fragrances. We carefully curate every scent from the heart of Dubai and beyond, bringing you true luxury at an honest price. Visit us in person at our shop in Kyustendil, 91 Tsar Osvoboditel Blvd., where you can experience the fragrances live and receive personal guidance. Every bottle tells a story of craftsmanship, heritage, and refinement.
